raw_consumer_statement: I have a credit card with Citibank and I have multiple charges on my account that I have disputed. Last year around the same time I already disputed the charge and it was never resolved. They claimed it was my responsibility. the Merchant is XXXX XXXXXXXX. I reiterated that I'm not interested in renewing my XXXX XXXXXXXX account. However I was charged last year on XXXX XXXX, XXXX, and again this year- XXXX the same date I'm charged for another year. I've explained to XXXX XXXX multiple times that I'm not interested in a paid membership. The original payment was {$74.00} XXXX ago and then they jacked up and kept charging me. I reached out to my credit card company explaining this and they refused to assist.
